prompt: 使用 IDAES 构建 HDA (hydrodealkylation) 反应器+循环系统：甲苯 + 氢气 → 苯 + 甲烷。进料：甲苯 0.3 mol/s + 氢气 0.3 mol/s，350K, 5 atm。反应器绝热，转化率 75%。反应器出口进入闪蒸罐（325K, 绝热），气相部分回流（20% purge），与新鲜进料混合。构建完整 flowsheet 并求解。

assertions.description: Uses GenericParameterBlock or BTX/HDA property package with benzene+toluene+hydrogen+methane
Has Feed(x2), Mixer, Heater, StoichiometricReactor, Flash, Splitter, Compressor, Product units
Uses tear stream initialization (SequentialDecomposition or manual propagate)
Fixes feed: 0.3 mol/s toluene, 0.3 mol/s H2, 350K, 5 atm
Reports results with stream table or report()
